hooks.command: if grep -rn "NEXT_PUBLIC_ANTHROPIC[A-Z_]*=" . --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.js" --include="*.env" --include="*.env.*" --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.claude --exclude="CLAUDE.md"; then echo "Forbidden pattern found: NEXT_PUBLIC_ANTHROPIC key"; exit 1; fi; exit 0

if grep -rn "SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY" . --include="*.ts" --include="*.tsx" --include="*.js" --include="*.env" --include="*.env.*" --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.next --exclude-dir=.git --exclude-dir=.claude --exclude="CLAUDE.md"; then echo "Forbidden pattern found: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY"; exit 1; fi; exit 0
if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'git commit'; then npx tsc --noEmit; fi
